name: Hashdex Commodities Trust
summary: Overview Hashdex Commodities Trust (f/k/a Tidal Commodities Trust I, prior to January 16, 2026) (the Trust), a Delaware statutory trust organized on February 10, 2023, is a series trust currently consisting of one series: Hashdex Bitcoin ETF (f/k/a Hashdex Bitcoin Futures ETF) (DEFI or the Fund). The Fund issues shares of beneficial interest, called Shares, representing fractional undivided beneficial interests in the Fund.
